title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Japanese Derby, and I'd love
for us to make an impressive entrance onto the
track, but...

I remember how Seiun Sky failed to show up to
our rendezvous point before the Satsuki Sho.
So I switch to my backup plan...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: There ya go!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Wide awake, just like ya ordered! She's a
heavy-duty sleeper, but I'm sure the shock's worn
off by now!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Using Hishiama for your own devices... You're too
clever, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
If you ask me, it was the perfect job for the Miho
Dorm leader! That's what I'm all about!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
From here on, I'll be comin' to wake you up
before all your big races. Be prepared!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ugh...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
At least now I can take my time changing clothes and
whatnot.

With that, the problem of getting Seiun Sky to
the racecourse is resolved. But I'm not finished
yet...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yeah, woohoo... I'm with ya...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Not that I know if I can really win this time, but I'll
give it a shot.
Woooooo!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Wow, check out the crowd. Should've expected
this for the Derby.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
The cheers aren't for the Derby alone, but also
for the rematch between the big three!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey there, King. Looking great today.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I am first-rate! I am never anything less than
great!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That's why I won't lose to anyone today—not to
you, and not to Special Week!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Special Week...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Let's leave her alone. Don't wanna break her
focus.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...That's right. Running in the Derby is a dream of
hers.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: But what about me?!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Oh my god, I'm so excited! Special Week is
totally gonna take first place!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
She's been saying she wants to win the Derby for
forever. I really want to see her fly past her big
three rivals and win!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Would you look at that? Seems like Spe's the
favorite to win.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Not a surprise. She's always had her sights on this
race.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But that's no reason I can't catch my own dream
here.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Right, Trainer?
